subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! Though the Sun of Truth be concealed behind the veils of glory from the horizon of the world... O ye beloved of God, strive ye that in this time of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی آفتاب حقیقت هر چند از افق عالم بسبحات جلال مخفی... ای احبای الهی  بکوشید که وقت ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
